notes: Nayuki 奈雪 sparkling water campaign poster featuring two bottles (pink/yellow) with kawaii illustration on pastel blue background. Strong functional claims design reference — '0卡0脂0糖' messaging with playful Japanese-inspired illustration.

Martín Berasategui chef-range premium frozen food packaging — silver/grey boxes with window food photography and signature script logotype. Excellent premium food range reference using photography + minimal structural design.
Tencent Music / QQ Music overseas campaign poster with 3D globe wrapped in reversed typography on a blue gradient. Strong tech-brand campaign reference for global launch messaging.

Japanese fruit liqueur range — 3 bottles (peach, yuzu, ume) with illustrated labels in warm earthy tones. Classic Japanese heritage bottle label reference for artisan spirits or flavoured liqueur range design.

Gordon's Gin slim cans (cucumber & elderflower) with botanical line art illustration on silver metallic substrate. Strong British heritage RTD can reference — line art + botanicals applied to metallic packaging.

Logo design reference sheet — Sony Music Publishing, Shawn Banks Panorama, MisterShot B monogram, Mour Oumousse geometric bird. Strong geometric logomark reference for brand identity and symbol design.

Peach Cheezo 芝芝桃桃 ice cream bar campaign poster with 3D exploded layer render showing tea shell, peach ice cream, yogurt and cheesecake on pink gradient. Excellent food product layering/hero reference for premium dessert brands.
Gogusuni Yellow Planet Site illustration using browser-window frame graphic on yellow grid. Strong Korean Y2K digital/web motif reference — great for digital-native brand visual language.

Plantag #植物标签 pistachio plant milk bottle campaign on vivid yellow-green background. Bold hashtag-led branding with functional health claims — strong reference for health-forward Chinese plant-based beverage.
Super Plants 超级植物 双11 campaign poster with flower mascot character in bathtub on bright green. Fun kawaii ecommerce seasonal campaign reference — character + bold type approach for Double Eleven.

Jetta luxury gift box product photography — two boxes (cream and navy/red) with traditional Chinese floral bird pattern, styled with tea cups on dark red background. Premium seasonal gifting reference with editorial staging and rich material finish.
Bath & Body Works hyaluronic acid gel sheet mask sachet with allover water droplet photography in teal/mint tones. Clean clinical layout with bold display type.
Japanese diet supplement pouch (Noevir Group) featuring strawberry milk flavoured probiotic tablets. Playful kawaii design with pastel watercolour-style splashes and confetti dots.
Iyemon Kyoto Blend hojicha roasted tea 600ml PET bottle. Heritage-led label with cream background, large kanji characters, and a red circular stamp seal. Elegant Japanese minimalism.
Sapporo Umekaku limited edition canned cocktail in ume (plum) yogurt soda flavour. Light teal can with illustration of plum fruit and a yogurt drink, charming kawaii Japanese style.
Clinical skincare key visual showing a glass dropper dispensing a pink liquid drop, surrounded by percentage-led efficacy claims. Stark white/grey background, confident luxury editorial feel.
Glico Pocky regional limited edition in sweet potato flavour. Kraft-tone box with botanical illustration of sweet potato plant. Heritage folk feel for a regional specialty SKU.
Coca-Cola Kochakaden CrafTea Lemonade PET bottle. Vibrant yellow label with bold lemon photography filling the pack, transparent base showing amber tea liquid. Fresh summer appeal.
Georgia Japan Craftsman canned coffee range shot showing two bottle variants (Japan Craftsman Zero and Creamy Cafe Zero). Dark navy labels with gold wordmark, strong masculine heritage positioning.
Chinese herbal plant drink (Fragrant Milkvetch Root) in a clear squat PET bottle showing front and back. Cream/beige minimal label with botanical seal and bilingual Chinese/English text.
Wilde protein chips bag in Chili Lime Verde Pork flavour. Vivid green with bold claims-led design and protein badge. Premium functional snack for health-conscious active consumers.
Officine Universelle Buly 1803 Pommade Virginale face cream tube and box with highly detailed classical engraving-style oval illustration of a woman. Quintessential French apothecary luxury heritage.
Iyemon Kyoto Blend hojicha PET bottle with bold red circular stamp/seal label. Strong visual contrast between red stamp and cream background. Different label variant from the companion cream SKU.
SNP Prep Peptaronic ampoule mask sachet on a soft pink background with liquid droplets and gel blobs. Gradient pastel design with fluid organic shapes. Quintessential K-beauty aesthetics.

Striking editorial reference photograph of a black horse painted with large colourful folk-art flowers. Bold naive illustration style against powder blue background. Strong visual reference for hand-painted floral motifs.
Dior key visual showing abstract macro shot of melting/sculpted lilac cream foundation or skincare texture against pure black background. Highly sculptural, sensual luxury editorial aesthetic.
Danone Ultimate Greek Style Yoghurt 850g blueberry tub. Photography-led with blueberries, cream bowl and spoons. Silver lid with robust badge-based labelling. Premium dairy presentation.

LU Biscuits range shot showing four SKUs (Beurre, Biscotte, Chocolat, Citron) each with a split-panel design. Product photography on one half, white engraving/logo on the other. Colour-coded by variant.
Asahi Cream Genmai Bran Maple flavour nutrition cracker bag. Warm beige/orange palette with maple syrup photography and health claim badges. Functional wellness snack with clean Japanese design.

Lotte Sweets Square ice cream range showing two SKUs: Ice Galette (pink) and Ice Pudding (mint/green). Photography-driven with elegant script wordmark. Soft pastel palette, premium confectionery feel.
Flat-lay topdown shot of multiple Japanese bakery gift boxes in bold vivid blue with contrasting illustration and typography. Modular range design with strong typographic visual language.
Ohayo Brulee chocolate ice cream box with gold foil mosaic tile border and product photography of a creme brulee dessert. Premium Japanese confectionery with French-inspired naming.
Shangyi range shot of two Chinese RTD tea bottles (Longjing and Oolong) in an editorial overhead lifestyle arrangement. Clean minimal labels on transparent bottles showing natural amber liquid.
Garden of Eatin' White Chips with Touch of Lime tortilla chip bag. Bold green with lime and corn product photography and organic/non-GMO claim badges. Strong health-oriented American snack brand.
Fujiya Look chocolate box in momo (peach) gelato limited edition. Warm pink box with photographic peach ice cream sundae. Premium Japanese confectionery with seasonal fruit flavour.

Macro editorial reference photograph of sliced green grapes in water with bubbles creating an all-over pattern. Translucent lime-green palette, dreamy editorial mood. Useful as colour and texture moodboard reference.

Allies of Skin Azelaic & Kojic Advanced Clarifying Serum in a striking metallic purple pump bottle. Bold clinical typography with ingredient claims. Strong visual shelf presence, premium clean beauty.
Numbuzin No.2 Water Collagen 65% Voluming pack with large pink gel numeral 2 as hero visual on a notebook-style sachet. K-beauty playful aesthetic with pearl and shell illustrations.
Frieda Foods smoked bacon cheese sticks in a dark brown bag with dramatic photography of the sticks on a dark plate. Gourmet adult snack positioning with rich smoky photography.
Bibigo Seaweed Chip Sweet Corn flavour pouch by CJ CheilJedang. Bold green with photography of chips and seaweed/corn ingredients. Strong Korean snack brand with global ambitions.
Suntory Oolong Ryo Cha tea can with deep navy blue and intricate gold botanical pattern featuring birds and flowers. Heritage Japanese/Chinese aesthetic with premium metallic finish details.
Avon sheet mask range showing three SKUs with large humorous copy-led typographic design over fruit photography. Strong copywriting-led packaging with cheeky slogans and bold black type.
Chinese ink brush painting of a dynamic horse head rendered in bold black brushstrokes on white paper with a red seal stamp. Reference for Chinese ink art aesthetic in premium packaging design.
Lotte Chilsung Cider range shot showing two flavour variants (Jeju green tangerine and Korean peach) in clear PET bottles with vivid colour-coded wrap labels. Bright Korean RTD soda design.
Smari Organic Icelandic Yogurt blueberry shown as two-pack range. Bold blue and white diagonal stripe pattern wraps the cup. Clean Scandinavian minimalism with strong typographic presence.
Allies of Skin Molecular Silk Amino Hydrating Cleanser tube and box with a stunning holographic rainbow gradient box paired with a clean white tube. Clinical ingredient-led typography.

Glico Pucchizza black pepper cheese cracker in distinctive triangular pack. Dark black/brown with geometric triangular crackers as hero visual. Sophisticated adult snack with unique structural packaging form.
Nacific Vita Ceramide Moisture Mask Pack 10-count box with individual sachet. Clean white with yellow circle/drop motif. Minimal clinical K-beauty design with photography of the moisture serum drop.
Chinese heritage fruit drink range (three SKUs with wintermelon, pear and tangerine variants) in cream-tone bottles with watercolour ink illustration labels. Elegant traditional Chinese aesthetic.
Purelab potassium supplement pouch made in Japan. Light blue/teal with bubble motif and clear nutrition call-outs. Ginger root photography at base. Clean Japanese functional supplement design.

October Fifth multigrain flaky cracker box (shiyue chuwu). Orange accent with detailed product photography showing 36-layer crispy cracker with sesame, oat and pumpkin seeds. Chinese health snack premium positioning.

Lotte Eatmint clear blue mint tablet sachet. Fresh blue-to-white gradient with dot pattern suggesting mint freshness. Bold EATMINT display wordmark. Clean Japanese confectionery for everyday freshness.

Chinese skincare key visual featuring three translucent glass spheres containing golden serum with bubbles. Highly editorial 3D macro composition on a warm grey background. Premium collagen/peptide positioning.
Suntory Iyemon Koi-Ama matcha latte can with vivid green and dramatic ink-wash swirl illustration suggesting rich matcha. Bold heritage Japanese label with hot product variant.

Nick. Roast Beef Cutlet Sandwich white box with clean bilingual typography and a simple flat illustration of the sandwich. Swiss minimalist inspired Japanese food packaging with playful numbered SKU system.

Iyemon Cha Japanese green tea range shot showing two glass bottle variants (Original Green and Roasted Green). Clean elegant labels with kanji stamp, warm green/amber tones. Organic premium positioning.

Luxury skincare key visual: overhead topdown macro shot of a golden needle/dropper dispensing into circular capsule trays with gold-toned serum. No copy visible; purely abstract product beauty photography.
Kanro Pure gummy candy winter limited edition in Citrus & Yogurt flavour. Vibrant yellow/orange pack with large citrus photography. Seasonal Japanese confectionery with snow crystal motifs.
ABC Cosmetics Cucumber facial mask sachet with all-over repeated cucumber slice photography in vibrant green. Ingredient hero design with script wordmark. Fresh organic beauty positioning.
Noosa finest yoghurt blueberry 4-pack multipack box. Vivid cobalt blue with bold wordmark and silhouette blueberry illustration. Strong visual shelf presence, humorous approachable American brand.

Yakult Joa probiotic fermented drink in muscat grape flavour. Green and gold branding with muscat grape photography. Japanese health drink with strong functional claims for iron, folic acid, calcium and vitamin D.
Jumor Chocolate Chips Cookies box in vivid teal/blue with bold typography and cookie tower photography. Vegan, gluten-free and organic claims prominently displayed. Clean bold American style.
Lipton Apple Tea PET bottle with bold script wordmark and apple photography. Warm golden yellow with deep red ribbon detail. Global Lipton brand identity with Japanese market RTD tea format.

Haitai Harmons Dipped Chocolate Cookie box with chocolate-dipped cookies topped with almond and walnut. Warm brown with vivid product photography. Korean confectionery with premium heritage positioning.
Japanese Potassium Rich+ supplement pouch with blue/teal water ripple imagery and bold nutrient call-outs. 270 tablet 30-day supply. Clean Japanese health supplement with functional claims.
Cellcure White 1000 skincare ampoule key visual set against a holographic rainbow gradient background with a glowing halo ring of light. Dreamy celestial luxury K-beauty editorial aesthetic.
Sable matcha cookie box with bold Chinese typography, playful character illustration and vivid green colourway — strong reference for vibrant Asian snack packaging.
Thymes Aqua Coralline hand cream tube and box — fluid watercolour wave pattern in aqua tones, elegant bilingual copy; excellent for premium beauty gifting references.
Split gold-glitter capsule product photography — striking luxury supplement hero shot with metallic spill effect; great for editorial health-beauty visual direction.
Kagoshima green tea PET bottle with diamond-pattern label and bold kanji typography — clean, trustworthy Japanese RTD tea reference.
Arocell CICA Repair gel mask sachet in mint green — minimal K-beauty packaging with bubble-gel illustration, soft frosted finish; strong clean skincare reference.
Roshen Konafetto cocoa wafer roll wrapper — warm brown heritage design with script logotype, cocoa photography and stamp detail; classic European confectionery style.
Chobani 'A hint of' Greek yogurt range — five SKUs showing pastel gradient cups with serif + script mixed typography; best-in-class example of colour-coded range architecture.
Kiwami Select collagen powder pouch with liquid-drop hero shot and warm gold gradient — premium Japanese supplement with luxe editorial treatment.
Nissin mf Moist Fusion supplement pouch — ultra-minimal white design with iridescent capsule graphic and monogram wordmark; refined Japanese beauty supplement reference.
Yoritoko mi ta su food pouch — precise line-art hand illustration with mixed Japanese/Latin typography on a clean white ground; excellent minimal Japanese food packaging reference.
Chinese butter/matcha/caramel sea salt waffle cookie box range — vivid colour-blocked boxes with bold typography; useful reference for bright Asian snack range design.
Kirin Gogo-no-Kocha 'The Meister's' orange tea and milk tea PET bottles — warm gold heritage label design with premium bilingual typography; strong RTD tea range reference.
Iyemon barley tea limited edition bottles with morning-glory botanical illustration — dark earthy palette; great reference for seasonal Japanese heritage tea design.
Iyemon morning iced tea lemon bottle — clean pastel blue label with lemon photography and Japanese kanji display type; refreshing summer RTD reference.
Meiji Pistachio Chocolate pouch — vivid green with pistachio photography and bold display type; punchy Japanese snack pack with strong flavour hero.
Koiwai iMUSE probiotic yogurt cup — clinical sky-blue design with gold foil badge and bubble motif; functional dairy packaging with premium Japanese feel.
Lucknow Lab Kamino-shima lemon juice mini bottle — artisan Japanese label with lemon illustration, minimal stamp typography; premium craft juice reference.
Hachiendo Tokyo Cream Pan banana flavour wrapper — bold yellow with large banana photography and kanji display type; energetic Japanese bakery snack reference.
Kao Emolika bath milk refill pouch — clean mint-green design with Japanese clinical typography and eco-friendly cues; functional refill packaging reference.
KIHACHI Wafers Lab campaign showing lemon and chocolate mint flavours with product pour shots on vivid yellow/blue backgrounds — dynamic split-composition food editorial reference.
Coca-Cola Chun Cha She functional tea range — warm gold gradient bottles with Art Nouveau botanical patterns and bilingual Chinese typography; premium RTD tea design.
hydra haircare range — three pump bottles in pastel gradient colourways (yellow/purple/navy), ultra-minimal sans-serif typography; Y2K-adjacent clean beauty reference.
Wallaby Organic Aussie Greek yogurt tub — navy/white with kangaroo illustration and bold mixed-case display type; trustworthy American organic dairy reference.
Glico Pretz Harvest sweet potato flavour box — mint and purple colourway with bold typography and vegetable photography; bright Southeast Asian snack reference.
Commune hand wash/body wash pump bottles in cream with intricate screen-printed Art Nouveau arch-and-tree motif — premium artisan personal care reference.
Asahi Vitamin C5000 lemon-lime candy pouch — vivid yellow-green with citrus photography and large C5000 callout; energetic health-candy crossover reference.
Heysong Zhui Ze sencha PET bottle — green wave-pattern label with bilingual premium typography and tea-leaf illustration; clean Japanese-style RTD tea from Taiwan.
Lay's limited edition Ramadan pack — deep green with intricate gold botanical pattern on dark background; excellent reference for culturally-coded festive packaging.
Close-up macro shot of blue-teal serum/gel texture swirl — abstract skincare ingredient photography with no type; useful editorial beauty texture reference.
Meiji Kajuu Gummy pear pouch — split green/pear-photography design with bold Japanese display type; vivid fruit candy reference.
Yuyu-kan slim supplement pouch range in pink dot/floral pattern — feminine kawaii Japanese design with warm pink palette; beauty supplement range reference.
Pink micro-bead serum close-up product photography — soft pink bubble texture on white ground; elegant beauty ingredient editorial shot.
Glico Cheeza mascarpone cheese cracker pouch — dark navy with gold star/bubble motif and bold mixed typography; playful Japanese premium snack reference.
Asahi Soy & Cream biscuit wrapper — clean white design with product photography and elegant mixed typography; healthy Japanese bakery snack reference.
It's Skin Power 10 Formula VC and VB mask sheet sachets — vivid yellow/green gradient design with bold clinical typography; strong K-beauty skincare range reference.
BCL Momopuri peach ceramide supplement pouch — soft pink gradient with oversized peach illustration and dual-language typography; feminine Japanese beauty supplement reference.
Lotte ZERO sugar-free sandwich cookie box — warm brown with stacked product photography; classic Japanese healthy-indulgence bakery reference.
Pokka Sapporo Nippon Mugicha barley tea bottle — warm gold with wheat illustration and Japan Quality badge; classic trustworthy Japanese barley tea design.
Samyang Tangle bulgogi alfredo cup noodle — clean white with bold script logotype, product photography and Korean Taste of Korea badge; modern Korean convenience food reference.
John John No.6 Mixed Roots vegetable crisps bag — clean white/green with hand-drawn root vegetable illustration, large numeral display type and anchor crest; premium British artisan snack reference.
Coca-Cola Japan Ayataka green tea bottle — allover geometric diamond pattern in dark green/blue with teapot illustration and Olympic partnership badge; heritage Japanese RTD tea reference.
77 Chocolates Milano maple sugar raisin puff pastry box — warm pink/brown with product photography and elegant bilingual typography; Taiwanese confectionery gifting reference.
Seoul Milk Live fruit juice carton range — three vivid colour-coded cartons in red (apple), purple (grape) and yellow (citrus); energetic Korean kids beverage range reference.
Ornate arch-shaped gift box with elaborate gold foil horse/phoenix illustration on deep crimson red — Chinese New Year handle box. Art deco styling, theatrical 3D staged setting with candelabras.
Teazen Kombucha Green Mandarin Lime — 30pk box + stick sachet. Clean white/green/yellow, Korean bilingual, RTB callouts (prebiotics, low calorie).
Smartfood Fiber Pop Toffee & Sea Salt — light blue bag, bold condensed type, high-energy snack with fiber RTB callout.
Lesser Evil Organic Popcorn — minimal white matte bag, quirky illustrated monk/Buddha mascot face, USDA organic, clean label.
Joy Days cookie bars — 3-SKU range in hot pink, cobalt blue, teal. High-energy neon palette, bold colour-blocked bags. Dopamine dressing at its best.
IncrediPuffs Saucilian Pizza — white bag on vivid red/orange, hand-drawn Italian chef mascot tossing pizza. Baked never fried. Comic-style illustration, bold display type.
Bold rainbow 'Hey' typographic poster — oversized condensed sans-serif with layered rainbow colour stripes creating 3D shadow effect. Strong retro graphic energy.
Illustrated cat close-up in pop-art style — extreme close-up of cat face looking upward, warm orange/pink fur gradient against vivid blue sky. Dreamy, serene energy.
Abstract gradient organic blob/pill forms — stacked 3D renders in neon pink/purple/blue/orange. Fluid, generative digital aesthetic.
9-panel emoji-face icon grid — bold flat design smiley face system on multicolour backgrounds (teal, mint, pink, yellow, cream, red, orange, blue). Joyful brand identity reference.
Minimalist gradient sphere with ground reflection — orange-to-deep-pink gradient circle on cool grey background. Serene, meditative, 3D digital art reference.
Rilla Penne pasta box — cool blue-grey matte, oversized condensed sans-serif, product photo inset, numeric code N-265. Swiss Modernist grid-based editorial design.
Love Corn BBQ small pouch — warm tan/brown matte, illustrated, approachable natural snack energy. Mini on-the-go format.
Avinka Pop Corn Chicken — vibrant green bag with all-over fork illustration pattern, vivid orange product. Lifestyle topshot with hand reaching in, scattered bags.
Kettle Ridge Cut Jalapeño Jack — deep forest green bag, wave texture, styled with fresh jalapeños, cheese, tomatoes and flowers on rustic wood. Heritage hand-cooked positioning.
Little Sesame hummus tubs — 3 stacked tubs (orange/mint/pink), bold all-type wrap-around labels. Flavours: Jammy Tomato, Smooth Classic, Caramelized Onion. Playful approachable health brand.
Stuffed Puffs S'mores campaign key visual — hand holding product against vivid cobalt blue, all-over repeated S'MORES type. High-energy punchy campaign.
Savonnière soap tins — 5 stacked oval matte tins in pastel mint/lavender/cream/orange/green. French pharmacy elegance, embossed medallion badge, serif type, clean ingredient RTB.
Oatcen Oat Porridge Strawberry & Lychee — bold yellow/pink retro pouch, illustrated spoon characters with faces, hand holding pack. Plant-based, zero sugar RTBs. Not your grandma's porridge.
Cravers 92% Hazelnut Butter — vivid orange label on clear glass jar, stark utilitarian sans-serif type, product visible. Vegan, plant-based, palm oil free RTBs. German brand.
Tama Tea Lemo Lavender sparkling green tea can — soft purple/yellow pastel, minimal premium feel.
Hotel Tango Lemoncello — editorial bold type label on amber bottle, confident typographic minimalism.
100% NICE4U vitamin sachets — repeating grid, bold pink type, playful health brand with pattern energy.
Fujian Tea newspaper-style packaging — off-white with bold bilingual type, minimalist editorial.
Dacoola Sour Jasmine & Green Apple mints — green illustrated box, fresh and vibrant Chinese packaging.
乘否 Zero-Fat Chips — white/gold box with data-forward RTB claims: 0% fat, +200% zinc, -57% calories. Clean clinical premium Chinese packaging.
Chinese plant milk (植草奶) Tetra paks — light blue/white cartons with bold green Chinese characters arranged in diagonal repeat topshot.
Sun Tropics Mochi Tamari Teriyaki Snack Bites — warm golden pouch, bold display type, floating product photography. Gluten free, dairy free RTBs.
Tohato Saku Saku Bakery baguette snack — hessian-texture bag, warm cream/beige, product photography of small baguette shapes. Butter salt flavor, traditional Japanese heritage.
Kinto Kuri chestnut confection — white/cream bag, large gold circular 栗 kanji emblem (visual hammer), product photography of glazed chestnuts. Earthy artisan Japanese heritage.
Sanriku seafood 炊き込み御飯 rice mix range — 8 color-coded boxes with detailed line illustrations of seafood. Japanese heritage folk art style, warm multicolour flat lay.
Consum Receta Premium chips — dark navy upper/mint teal lower bag, premium ingredient photography (chips + rosemary + salt spoons). 2020 Pentawards Silver winner.
Bestore (良品铺子) snack range — 4 bags (yellow/brown/blue/grey) with bold oversized Chinese typography and product photography. Clean range shot topshot.
Attitude Sunly after sun stick — clean pale blue/white, plastic-free suncare. Eco-conscious minimal design. Vegan, dermatologist-tested.
Huel Daily Greens — dark forest green slim can, clean bold type, confident premium health nutrition. 25 calories, adaptogens, lion's mane.
Flock Chicken Breast Sticks Original — stark white stand-up pouch, minimal black type, clinical protein-forward. 15G protein, 0G carbs, 0G sugar.
Dried Fruit range — 3 soft pastel pouches (lavender/mint/peach) in topshot lifestyle with fresh and dried ingredients styled around them on warm cream background.
Whatever by 南岛KULANGSU — Chinese gifting set with dreamy green/yellow gradient art direction on boxes, candle jar, and shopping bag. Editorial lifestyle, MINI旅行套盒.
Flat vector music note icon set — scattered colorful abstract music note characters in orange, purple, teal, yellow, pink on white. Bold, playful, minimal.
Y2K retro computer-themed social media sale templates — 6-panel grid with pastel purples/yellows/greens, browser window UI elements, emoji, stars. Nostalgia-driven campaign reference.
Three nested concentric smiley face circles — yellow (large), orange (medium), pink (small) with closed-eye content expressions. Joyful flat illustration.

Font/lettering promo collage on pink background. Bold retro typography — 'The Surf Shack', 'Passport', 'Summer Hiatus', 'Vacation Display' — in navy, orange, and red. Retro Americana resort aesthetic.

Japanese urban revitalisation event poster (2009). Large bold Japanese/English typography on white with green border. Network Between Two Cities — Taipei and Yokohama Koganecho. Strong typographic hierarchy.
Spring Equinox (春分) seasonal poster 2023. Dark forest green background with illustrated pink and yellow flowers, leaves, and ladybirds. Bilingual Chinese/English. Nature-forward festive design.
Minimal geometric badge on solid black — rounded square with radiating spike/arrow details in grey. Stark monochrome identity mark or icon reference.
Bar event 'Cheers! / 碰个杯' poster (2022). Neon green and purple with bold illustrated beer glasses. Collaborative event between Waking Lotus Bar and a creative studio. Hand-drawn illustration feel.
Mid-Autumn Festival 2021 promotional poster. Yellow smiley moon with waving cartoon hands on grey halftone background. Bilingual Chinese/English. Contemporary playful festive design.

Classic Modernist poster for InterDesign Inc., Minneapolis-Saint Paul. Lime green rounded geometric shapes on white. Helvetica-era grid-based design c.1970s. Strong Swiss/Modernist aesthetic reference.

Chinese art exhibition poster 'Collision Between Time and Space.' Four-quadrant grid with bold gradient colour blobs — cyan, magenta, green, yellow. Typography in black on white cutouts. Bilingual Chinese/English.
MIS Ice Tea carton range — Lemon (yellow/teal) and Watermelon (red/green). 1L carton with bold illustrated fruit graphics and ice motifs. Vibrant, appetite-forward Middle Eastern brand.

2017 International Arts Education Week poster (Korea). Bold geometric shapes — purple triangle, teal rectangle, magenta arc — on white. Strong typographic layout with vertically rotated text. Korean and English.

'Steal the Moon (2021)' mooncake gift set by SeeSaw Coffee collab. Minimal white boxes with abstract illustrated labels in yellow, purple, and green. Displayed on clear acrylic stand with fruit props.
Mikkeller San Diego 'Beer Geek Brunch' — circular beer label, two illustrated quirky bear characters, brown/cream. Barrel-aged imperial oatmeal stout brewed with coffee.
2020 Tainan employment fair social media post. Bright yellow-green background, bold Chinese typography, flat cartoon character. Bilingual social media graphic.
Guangxi Design Week 2020 event badge set — 4 die-cut credentials (VIP, Staff, Exhibitor, Guest) each with distinct abstract geometric shape in lavender, blue, teal, and orange.
Camping/outdoor festival sticker set on black background. Bold Chinese calligraphic brush type in neon green and yellow. 'Fight Wild' / Ancinet Springtown event branding.
Minimalist digital artwork 'WEDNESDAY' — vivid electric blue background with two overlapping soft blue/white gradient 3D spheres. Clean, contemporary digital art reference.
Chinese ultimate frisbee (极限飞盘) event poster — light sky blue background, bold 3D illustrated frisbee, real action photography, sticker-style typography. Energetic sporty aesthetic.
Dark typographic poster — words (tradition, season, dream, smile, solution...) arranged in a continuous spiral ribbon on solid black. White sans-serif type. Strong typographic form experiment.
Freshippo (盒马) private label '盒马零系列' brand & package design 2020–2022 key visual. Cyan gradient background with large gradient 'O' letterform. Clean, clinical, contemporary brand reference.
Bold 'YOU GOT THIS' typographic poster in coral and navy — high-energy motivational design with large display type and shadow cutout effect. Strong reference for bold colour-led campaigns.
ARITAUM 'ONLINE ONLY' K-beauty campaign poster — inflated 3D bubble text in pink/blue against a pink grid background. Strong Y2K kawaii aesthetic with sparkle details.
Soft watercolour wash in mint green and pale yellow — pure mood/texture reference. Useful as background or palette inspiration for gentle, calming packaging directions.
GELIOUS cylindrical tubes with embossed surface texture and minimal line-art botanical illustration — 'Sustainable Gardening' concept. Scandinavian clean aesthetic with script label.
LOTTE Milkis carbonated milk drink cans in Strawberry and Melon flavours — pastel illustrated cans with cute cartoon characters. Strong reference for playful Korean beverage packaging.
Headspace 'Feel closer' campaign — bold orange background with abstract geometric face characters in yellow and pink circles. Clean, warm illustration style for wellness brand.
520 Valentine's Day campaign (Chinese '我爱你' equivalent) — retro TV sets with bold pop art typography on hot pink. Y2K nostalgia meets Chinese digital culture.
AIRMETER 空刻意面 spaghetti box — vivid orange with large photographic hero shot of bolognese pasta. Confident bilingual Chinese food brand that blends Western product with bold Chinese design.
Busan Designer Annual Party 2019 — Korean editorial poster with experimental kinetic typography and ribbon graphic. Strong reference for bold Korean graphic design and condensed mixed-weight type.

潮汕牛肉丸 Chaoshan beef ball brand poster — electric yellow and blue duotone with bold bilingual display type and illustrated hand holding meatballs on a skewer. Energetic neo-brutalist Chinese food branding.

Hawaiian style macaroni salad label — abstract illustrated ingredients (olive, tomato, blueberry, macaroni) with bold serif and hand-lettered type on white. Memphis-influenced playful food label design.
HAKUTSURU lemon sparkling jelly sake can — yellow/gold diamond argyle pattern with illustrated lemon. Heritage Japanese sake brand with a youthful, summery flavour extension.

Iriya Morning Glory Festival (入谷朝顔まつり) poster — large flat illustrated morning glory flowers in lilac and green on white with wave-line background. Beautiful reference for Japanese festival graphic design.
Häagen-Dazs x Holiland 好利来 'Baby Snow' strawberry ice cream sandwich — pink box with illustrated strawberries and product photography. Cute collab packaging for the Chinese premium dessert market.
Coca-Cola illustrated campaign poster — bold blue background with hand-drawn style retro illustration of hand holding Coke bottle. Japanese/Chinese text, Y2K sticker aesthetic, very fun and graphic.

Creditrip 'Happy New Year' CNY campaign poster — split layout combining bold English typography with Chinese brush calligraphy '福' character. Sophisticated black/gold editorial approach to Chinese New Year.
SPRING-branded pop-up retail booth in a shopping mall — neon green checkerboard structure with daisy motifs. Strong reference for energetic in-store brand activation and seasonal retail design.
Japanese watercolour illustration of mimosa flowers in yellow, peach and orange — delicate hand-painted botanical art. Beautiful spring texture reference for feminine, dreamy packaging palettes.

Exhibition poster 'Do Something Aimlessly' — experimental typography with mirrored/rotated text within an abstract flower shape in pink and green. Strong Swiss modernist reference with playful irreverence.
Holiland 好利来 BASQUE cheesecake social media visual — deep terracotta brown with oversized cream Serif 'CHO 半熟巴斯克' typography. Gourmet, heritage feel for premium Chinese bakery brand.
Cute blue and white ditsy floral pattern — small illustrated flowers and leaves scattered on white. Classic cottagecore reference for feminine, gentle pack design or surface pattern inspiration.
Chinese '立秋 Beginning of Autumn' seasonal poster — warm amber gradient with white botanical wheat/reed illustration and tiny ballerina silhouette. Elegant, dreamy seasonal content reference.
Sparkling Urban Lemonade / Yuzu Lime glass bottles — yellow-green illustrated label on a glass bottle with reflective sky lifestyle photography. Clean Scandinavian-influenced beverage design.

Chinese 'Hello February / 早安' morning greeting social poster — dreamy pink gradient with illustrated abstract flowers and star sparks. Y2K soft aesthetic, common reference for gentle seasonal content.

白葡萄 White Grape Kaoliang spirit — vivid teal/yellow flat pop art illustration of the bottle with bold bilingual typography. Strong reference for young-skewing Chinese spirits branding with streetwear energy.
Bananain 蕉内 autumn campus recruitment poster — warm orange/yellow with layered bold Chinese and English typography. Strong neo-brutalist energy for Chinese lifestyle apparel brand.
MAY HAPPY 5月刊 graphic magazine-style design — maximalist collage of icons, symbols and bold mixed typography on teal. Memphis-influenced Chinese design reference for energetic seasonal content.
